use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADVANCED GASTROINTESTINAL STROMAL TUMOR IN PATIENTS PREVIOUSLY ADMINISTERED AT LEAST THREE TYROSINE KINASE INHIBITORS, WHERE ONE OF THE KINASE INHIBITORS IS IMATINIB
FOR THE TREATMENT OF ATTENTION DEFICIT HYPERACTIVITY DISORDER (ADHD)
